name: PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi
description_hindi: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi yojana ke tahat kisan parivar ko pratyek varsh arthik sahayata di jaati hai.

name: Ayushman Bharat
description_hindi: Garib parivaron ko swasthya bima suraksha pradan karti hai.

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
description_hindi: Fasal nuksan ke khilaf suraksha pradan karti hai.
eligibility_hindi: Sabhi kisan jo fasal ugate hain.
benefit_hindi: Prakritik aapda se hue nuksan ka bima.

name: Kisan Credit Card
description_hindi: Kisano ko sasta rin uplabdh karata hai.

name: PM Krishi Sinchai Yojana
description_hindi: Har khet ko pani pahunchane ka lakshya.

name: Soil Health Card
description_hindi: Mitti ki gunvatta ki jankari pradan karta hai.

name: PMGSY
description_hindi: Gramin sadak connectivity sudharne ki yojana.

name: PMAY-G
benefit_hindi: Ghar nirmaan ke liye arthik sahayata.
